rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

sonuc.fr: Besoin en fonds de roulement net

suggestedActions: Verify financial projections with actual data.

description.short: Calculate working capital (current assets - current liabilities).
description.long: Calculate working capital (current assets - current liabilities).

short_i18n.en: Calculate working capital (current assets - current liabilities).
short_i18n.tr: Şirketin kısa vadeli likidite gücünü (çalışma sermayesi) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie das Betriebskapital (Umlaufvermögen - kurzfristige Verbindlichkeiten).
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le fonds de roulement (actifs courants - passifs courants).
short_i18n.es: Calcular el capital de trabajo (activos corrientes - pasivos corrientes).
short_i18n.ar: حساب رأس المال العامل (الأصول المتداولة - الخصوم المتداولة).

long_i18n.en: Calculate working capital (current assets - current liabilities).
long_i18n.tr: Şirketin kısa vadeli likidite gücünü (çalışma sermayesi) hesaplar.
long_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie das Betriebskapital (Umlaufvermögen - kurzfristige Verbindlichkeiten).
long_i18n.fr: Calculer le fonds de roulement (actifs courants - passifs courants).
long_i18n.es: Calcular el capital de trabajo (activos corrientes - pasivos corrientes).
long_i18n.ar: حساب رأس المال العامل (الأصول المتداولة - الخصوم المتداولة).
